active.description: Whether the token is valid (true or false).

aud.description: Intended audience for the token (e.g., the API).

client_id.description: Client ID for which the token was issued.

scope.description: Space-delimited list of scopes associated with the token.

sub.description: The subject of the token (typically the user ID).

username.description: The username of the authenticated user.

BearerAuth.description: Type "Bearer" followed by a space and then your access token.
